block.seven_sins.sin_altar.unaligned: You are not yet aligned with any sin. Use a Sin Emblem to choose your path.
sin.seven_sins.wrath.description: The sin of uncontrolled rage and violent anger.
sin.seven_sins.greed.description: The sin of excessive desire for wealth and power.
sin.seven_sins.sloth.description: The sin of laziness and failure to act.
sin.seven_sins.pride.description: The sin of excessive belief in one's own superiority.
sin.seven_sins.lust.description: The sin of intense craving and overwhelming desire.
sin.seven_sins.envy.description: The sin of coveting what rightfully belongs to others.
sin.seven_sins.gluttony.description: The sin of overindulgence and insatiable appetite.
message.seven_sins.sin_chosen: You have chosen the path of %s. There is no turning back.
message.seven_sins.already_aligned: You are already bound to a sin.
